pi_items.source: Verified setup_task.sh which downloads files to these expected paths.

pi_items.metadata_value: SRTM DEM + Landsat satellite imagery from github.com/opengeos/data
pi_items.verified_value: Elevation Dataset (NAVD88 vertical datum, likely USGS 3DEP) and Landsat 7 TOA imagery from github.com/opengeos/data
pi_items.source: Downloaded files and inspected raster tags with rasterio. dem.tif has vertical_datum='NAVD88', typical of 3DEP rather than SRTM. landsat.tif has LICENSE for LANDSAT_LE7_TOA_5YEAR.

privileged_info_summary: The data files are real datasets downloaded from github.com/opengeos/data, but there are two major contradictions to the task premise: 1) The Landsat imagery (California, ~36-38N) and DEM (Oregon, ~44N) do not overlap geographically, making true spatial co-registration impossible. 2) The Landsat image contains standard visible and NIR bands (B1=Blue, B2=Green, B3=Red, B4=NIR), directly contradicting the task description's claim that B1 is SWIR1 and B4 is Green.
